title: Windy weather expected on Wednesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The weather...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The weather today, Tuesday looks to be pleasant with plenty of sunshine. A slightly warmer day than yesterday is expected in our region.


> The South African Weather Service has issued a yellow level 1 warning for damaging winds leading to difficulty in navigation at sea between Cape Agulhas and Plettenberg Bay from Wednesday, 11 September, from late afternoon.


Photo for illustration only. Fernando, Unsplash.


> Your weather on Tuesday and Wednesday this week:


Tuesday 10 September

TownMinMaxGeorge617Knysna919Plettenberg Bay917Mossel Bay617Riversdale319Oudtshoorn221Graaff-Reinet718

Wednesday 11 September

TownMinMaxGeorge718Knysna1121Plettenberg Bay1119Mossel Bay1019Riversdale621Oudtshoorn525Graaff-Reinet626

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
